scores.notes: The response describes files as created but does not include the actual code content, so completeness is partial per scoring instructions. The described approach uses install+config-changed events with direct status assignment (legacy style) rather than CollectStatusEvent (modern best practice) — both are valid per gold standard notes, but less idiomatic. All described APIs (install event, config-changed event, ActiveStatus, WaitingStatus) are real with no hallucinations. Cannot fully verify runs_correctly without seeing the code.
